content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.external.github_ext
FILE: cosmos/integration/external/github_ext.py (111 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos GitHub Integration (Full Implementation).

"The Code must flow!"

Features:
1. Issue Sync: Injects GitHub issues as tasks.
2. PR Review: Can trigger code reviews via the Critic Agent.
3. CI/CD Monitoring: Watches for build failures.

CLASSES:
- GitHubProvider(ExternalProvider)
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def sync(self)
  Methods: async def execute_action(self, action: str, params: Dict[str, Any]) -> Any
